action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval 0.5877 with 87.33% success. Room/tunnel only 82% success. Failed episodes = 0 score. Analysis: Need to improve success rate by: 1) visited penalty (avoid revisiting), 2) stuck detection (switch strategy when no progress), 3) neighbor utility aggregation (find rich frontier regions), 4) better endgame handling. Decision: Write improved predict.py with these features, test multiple configs on training maps, submit best.
